blog_title: DTF Print After 50 Washes — Cheap vs Premium Blank T-Shirt Result for Indian Printers
caption:
Same DTF print. One survived 50 washes, the other cracked at 15. 😬

The difference? The ₹45 blank vs the ₹80 blank. Cheap fabric = rough yarn = print doesn't bond. Premium combed cotton has a smooth surface DTF loves. We learned this the hard way after a customer's 500-piece order failed.

Rule: Use at least 200 GSM. Test one piece with 10 washes before going bulk.

Save this if you're sourcing blanks for your next print run 👇
